handoff_summary: Session ended. TASK-004 (Playwright E2E suite for m4to.com) completed the full loop: research → implementation → review → review fixes → all-PASS human UAT → closed. Suite: 8 tests green in tests/e2e/ (landing, navigation, buttons, contact-form; EmailJS submission always intercepted, serviceWorkers blocked). Commits 302c87c, 05e3cb2, 8c2aeda, e3d07c8 on main; remote is https://github.com/lordiwa/agentic-test-demo.git. Seeded placeholder tickets TASK-001..003 remain todo, deprioritized at human direction.

decisions.decision: Deprioritize seeded placeholder tickets (TASK-001..003) at human direction; real work item is TASK-004 Playwright tests for m4to.com.
Contact-form tests are boundary-only: never trigger a real submission; use route interception if the form posts to a backend.
git init run locally (main) so developer commits conform to repo etiquette; remote https://github.com/lordiwa/agentic-test-demo.git provided by human at UAT close-out.
Persona-switcher content is randomized per visit; assertion checks default-content disappearance instead of pinned copy. Easter-egg mini-games deliberately untested per USE-CASES.md.
Knowledge-graph decision→task edge recording skipped: src/knowledge-graph.js does not exist in this project.

subagent_results.summary: m4to.com is live: 'Rafael Matovello - Multiverse Portfolio', a client-side-rendered SPA. All paths return an identical empty shell — developer must run live Playwright discovery first. Plan: landing load, nav links via getByRole, buttons incl. popup handling, contact form boundary-only with page.route() interception. Hazards: hydration waits, possible consent banner, catch-all fallback masking 404s, live-site rate limits (workers 1-2). Config: baseURL https://m4to.com.

IMPL complete. Discovery: SPA, empty shell for all paths; splash gate 'START MULTIVERSE MACHINE'; persona switcher randomized per visit; external links target=_blank; contact form POSTs to api.emailjs.com — all tests intercept non-GET requests. Specs in tests/e2e/ + tests/TEST-PLAN.md. 8 passed (1.3m), green twice. Commits 302c87c, 05e3cb2, 8c2aeda.
Independently reproduced green run (8/8). All 4 ACs MET. Only HIGH was the then-missing uat comment (process gate). MEDIUM serviceWorkers:'block' + locator nits requested.
Review fixes landed in e3d07c8: serviceWorkers:'block' in playwright.config.ts, real 2s banner grace via waitFor, exact '← Back' locator. Re-verified: 8 passed (1.2m), tsc clean.
